doc.intent: green DMG tint, LCD matrix, slow-pixel ghosting
doc.known_gap: Critic finding 2026-07-07: the DMG green tint is texture-driven inside gameboy.slangp and applies only on the RetroArch slang path; the tap shader renders an untinted LCD grid. Remediation options: gambatte core-option palette (dmg green) in the RetroArch profile, or a per-system screen tint in the tap.
